isi.lyrics:

Romanization

han yeoreum bam haneul sunoeun Starlight
It’s in my heart too bomnal pin kkotcheoreom
Baby, Is it a surprise

For me it’s all a surprise

ssodajineun Milky way
neoreul ttaraon Melodies
byeoljaril ieoga
geu arae neowa na

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Crush - OVERLAP

Romanization

euneunhan bulbit arae gyeopchin uri
geurimjaneun hanaga dwae
irijeori kkeureodanggine
Steam on the mirror
tteugeoun ttami tteoreojine
geogi, geogi gettin’ deeper

jeojeun tawori badage
chagaun tail wie geolteoanja
jojonghadeusi nal hwigamne

When we overlap
urin jeongsin mot charige eokhigoseolkiji

na daeume neo daeume na daeume neo daeume
Divin’, ridin’, it’s perfect timing

dwiseokkin chaero slippin’ on your skin
kkeunjeogine sticky

isi.lyrics:

Romanization

In a violet sky
Endless paradise
Don’t wanna close my eyes
California dreaming
Let the ocean take me
If you're my last view

Ain't no amount of miles on the road too far
That's how valuable you are
You are the special one
You are the special one

Like the stars in the purple sky
We're riding a Pacific high
Can't believe my eyes
Need you by my side

Like the Malibu sun, you shine
You're brighter than the Fourth of July
Even if I'm in the rain
Can't complain when I see your smile

Splash
We can take it slow or go fast
Oh, baby, you're the best I ever had, yeah
No space in between us
A goddess like Venus
